    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the camera specs of the Google Pixel 6?
        The Google Pixel 6 features a dual-camera system with a 50 MP wide lens and a 12 MP ultrawide lens. It includes advanced features like Magic Eraser, Face Unblur, and Night Sight, which enhance photo quality in various lighting conditions. The front camera is 8 MP, suitable for selfies and video calls.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • How does the Tensor chip impact Pixel 6 performance?
        The Google Pixel 6 is powered by Google's custom Tensor chip, which enhances AI and machine learning capabilities. This results in better overall performance, more efficient battery use, and improved experiences in voice recognition and computational photography.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What are the battery life and charging features?
        The Pixel 6 has a 4614mAh battery, supporting all-day usage. It offers fast charging, wireless charging, and battery share capabilities. The adaptive battery technology learns your apps usage and reduces power to the ones you rarely use, optimizing battery life.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
